    What type of cuisine is Sofia Frankston?
    modern Italian cuisine
    Sofia's Restaurant in Frankston is a 350 seated venue that caters for the full spectrum of its customers, being accessible and affordable to the general public. Serving modern Italian cuisine including gourmet pizzas, authentic pastas and fresh seafood.
